about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a software developer focused on turning ideas into high-performance systems. I work with full-stack development utilizing TypeScript, React, Svelte, Vue, Node.js, and Bun. Experience in creating dynamic applications that require real-time communication, lightweight architectures, and end-to-end value delivery.

projects.sabine: Sabine is a powerful and all-in-one Valorant simulator and esports coverage bot for Discord.
projects.cidadaomais: Cidadão+ is a public service guidance platform with categorized search, requirements, step-by-step instructions, and official links.

metadata.title: Levi Santos Pires — Software Developer
metadata.description: Software developer specializing in React Native, React, Vue, TypeScript, Node.js, and Bun.
